description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a landscaped yard with several large, leafy trees. The exterior walls are a mix of white and reddish-brown, with large windows distributed asymmetrically on all sides. The front features a modest entryway with a small paved path leading to the door, flanked by greenery. The roof appears to have skylights or roof windows, and the house is set back from a gray driveway or street. The rear and side elevations show additional windows and a possible patio or backyard area. The overall design is clean and functional, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard with trees. The exterior is a mix of white and reddish-brown, with a simple entryway and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, a paved path, and dense landscaping with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the reddish-brown exterior wall, large windows, and the driveway extending alongside the house.
description_view_2: Rear view with more windows, a possible patio area, and trees framing the back of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, the white exterior, and the driveway on the right.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple front door with a paved path, no porch or columns, flanked by landscaping and trees.
